title: InstaLoad
description: Makes world swapping feel nearly instant.
body:
# InstaLoad

InstaLoad is a Fabric mod for **Minecraft 1.21.x** focused on faster and smoother world transitions.

## Features

- Reduces the spawn region warmup from 441 chunks to 1 chunk.
- Skips blocking loading UI during join/respawn/reconfiguration world swaps.
- Keeps network/world-loading logic running while removing the blocking screen layer.

## Notes

- Compatible with **Minecraft 1.21.x**.
- Verified on **1.21.8+**
- This project is an independent 1.21.x implementation inspired by the "Optimized World Swapping" of Patcher in 1.8.9 and Fastload in 1.18-1.20.
